hotel_name: Khu nghỉ dưỡng Pullman Phú Quốc (Pullman Phu Quoc Beach Resort)

reviews.title: Worst holidays ever with this hotel
reviews.text:
The reception of the Pullman Resort Phu Quoc did not inform us about the fire alarm testing occurring every Wednesday at 2pm. 
Hence we were waken up by the piercing sound of the fire alarm in the middle of our deep nap really shocked and stressed 

We spoked to the reception and they just tell us that they were sorry from behind their counter.
We wanted to talk to the front manager but she was off that day and they will let her know that we wanted to talk to her. 
One day later, nobody contacted us until we asked again to talk with the front manager.
We also spoke to M. Pieter, the General Manager about this issue, even though also apologizing, he didn’t make us feel that he was understanding us saying that fire alarm testing was mentioned in their 50-page policy book that no guest has time to read it of course and that it also happened to him before.

This situation could have been easily avoided if they informed us before.
We do understand that fire alarm testing is important. However, informing your guests about it should also be a must and easy task to do when checking-in.

Therefore, we won’t recommend this hotel to anyone in our network and won’t visit this hotel ever again. Other hotels in Phu Quoc treat their guests better than that with better services.
reviews.response:
Dear Mr. Vincent, 

Thank you for your comments.
Despite the fact that all our hotel rooms have open access to the outside through open corridors, as informed in our guest room directory, we conduct a weekly fire alarm test to ensure optimal safety for our guests. This short sound test takes place at 2PM every Wednesday to cause the least disturbance possible. Our Director of Rooms and Director of Operation and myself did apologize during your stay to you and your friend for the fact that it scared you, and we decided to add an information board at the reception counter and the breakfast area to reinforce the safety procedure message.

Safe travels and wishing you a happy 2022.
Pieter DE WEERD | General Manager

reviews.title: unhygienic hotel ! Horrible
reviews.text:
I do not recommend this resort, primarily due to serious hygiene issues and service quality that fall far below a 5-star standard. Apart from the front desk manager Kevin, the staff appeared poorly trained and unprofessional.
Cons:
	1.	Found a massive hairball stuck to a supposedly fresh towel in the room—completely unacceptable and gross.
	2.	Staff rang the doorbell at 8 am to ask about cleaning despite us not activating the “clean the room” sign
	3.	Despite displaying “do not disturb” signs while at breakfast, staff still entered our room without permission.
	4.	The room had a persistent musty odor, lacking freshness.
	5.	There was an intermittent “beep” every ten minutes the first day. It turned out to come from the safety box which was never promptly addressed by staff. 
	6.	The floor was sticky until we complained and requested cleaning.
	7.	Several loose tiles around the swimming pool caused a cut on my niece’s toe—a safety hazard.
	8.	If you book through third-party apps, bring proof of payment. The hotel insisted on seeing it despite having records, citing their “policy.”
	9.	The shower water pressure was extremely low
10. We requested a connecting room and were initially told it depended on availability. However, upon check-in, we were informed that there were no connecting rooms available with our booking type. This inconsistency was frustrating.
Pros:
	1.	The hotel looks aesthetically pleasing and new on the surface but lacks proper cleanliness.
	2.	Breakfast was delicious with a wide variety of options.
	3.	The private beach including a beach bar, is beautiful.
	4.	The large swimming pool offers a bubble event for kids in the evening.
	5.	There is a spacious and nice playroom for children.
	6.	English proficiency among the staff was limited and many appeared undertrained.

After the severe “hairball” incident, the hotel offered us a 50% discount on food and beverage items and late check out as an apology, which we appreciated but did not compensate for the overall experience.

reviews.title: A (NOT) REMARKABLE HOTEL. Hope the GM READS.
reviews.text:
We stayed during new year but the hotel is short of staffs. A massive hotel with ONE menu from pool to beach to room services. Located 20m away from the town which is very inconvenient. There are no shops or convenient stores at or around the hotel. The room service is awful. Second day we had to start eating outside of the hotel. Breakfast is great, the only thing nicely done. 

The rest of the resort is not ready to serve at any kind of vacation standard. Beach bar is not open until 11 so you cant even have a morning by the beach! 🤷‍♀️🤷‍♀️🤷‍♀️  

NO COCONUT 🥥 available in the hotel. No menu anywhere that you can find, have to ring the staffs every time if you want to order anything, every time, across the resort.

 Might be good for a family trevelling with kids and a RICE COOKER so they don't starve. 👨‍👩‍👦‍👦👨‍👩‍👦‍👦 🍚  🍜 .
reviews.response:
We are so sorry that while the breakfast was great, we didn't meet your expectations when it came to other F&B services. Our Beach House is meant for light bites & cocktails while enjoying the sunsets, therefore, we operate the bar only from noon. Due to the complicated situation of the epidemic, we had to focus more on minimizing direct contact of customers with printed collaterals as well as disinfecting them every time they come in contact to ensure safety. A room service menu is available on your room's IPTV. As a 5-star resort, and in particular during the pandemic, we ensure that all the food & beverage items are the freshest,  so they are ordered on a daily basis leading to the issue that some items may be out of stock at the time of ordering. 

We understand that these uncomfortable experiences nevertheless affected our guests and we are sorry about this. We hope to have the chance to welcome you back soon that more outlets are open including our Sim Boutique right in the lob
reviews.room_type: PREMIUM DELUXE ROOM, 1 King Size Bed, Ocean View

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
Overall Pullman was a great experience

Hotel is well maintained & is very pretty. Staff are really lovely. The main restaurant is delicious, food was excellent and a good mix of western and Vietnamese. Breakfast is also very good and tasty with lots of variety. The mad cow restaurant was really incredible but is slightly overpriced, it’s very expensive comparatively speaking to other restaurants in the area. It’s on the higher end and more like Singaporean prices. The main restaurant on the ground floor is more reasonable and is worth the money for sure.

We had an issue with our room, there was a strong smell from the drains which can happen in tropical climates but the hotel rectified the situation and upgraded us to a beautiful villa at no extra charge. It was so nice and we were very happy there.

The beach is very nice and well maintained
reviews.negatives: Only issue is the location. It’s very close to the airport which is great but the surrounding area is pretty rundown and lots is abandoned developments. You can travel around very easily to sunset town or to Phu Quoc main town but you will have to take taxis. If you have smaller kids, there is nowhere to go other than the resort within walking distance. If you’re ok with taking taxis then this is a very good option as it’s one of the best resorts on the island.

reviews.title: Unclean water
reviews.text: Water is unclean and dirt yellow. They said something is wrong with the pumping system and needs to run the water for hours to clear it. This should’ve been done before the guest checked in, and not after

reviews.title: A beautiful hotel, with room for improvement
reviews.positives: The hotel is beautiful, and so is the beach. It offers all the essential services a tourist might need, and the swimming pool is spacious and clean. The hotel also boasts lovely views from multiple angles. The staff are wonderful, helpful, and always welcoming to guests. he island, overall, is peaceful and surrounded by beautiful beaches, with a variety of activities and tourist attractions to enjoy. The hotel features a tour desk that assists guests in arranging different excursions and experiences, making it easier to explore the area. The Vietnamese people are friendly and warmly welcome visitors. Breakfast was good, but it would be even better if it included options that cater to guests from outside Asia, such as those from the Middle East, Arab Countries, and Europe.
reviews.negatives: It would be even better if there were stronger English language proficiency among the team, as this would greatly enhance communication and improve the overall guest experience. The beach could benefit from more attention in terms of cleanliness. Additionally, some of the tours organized by the hotel’s tour desk do not adequately follow proper safety procedures. There should be a minimum standard of safety measures and equipment in place to ensure smooth and secure access for visitors to and from boats and marine attractions. I booked a boat trip but wasn’t able to participate in many of the activities due to the lack of proper safety measures and the difficulty of moving to and from the boats. The hotel is located quite far from the island’s main tourist attractions — possibly over 30 minutes by car — but it is conveniently close to the airport. Additionally, the hotel rates are relatively high compared to other hotels of a similar standard that offer better proximity to key tourist sites.

reviews.title: Mixed Feelings About the Stay
reviews.text: The views and gardens were stunning, and the hot water was consistently reliable, making for a pleasant experience. However, the sleep quality left much to be desired, and transport options were lacking, which hindered getting around easily. While cleanliness was commendable, the staff's service fell short of expectations, impacting the overall experience. Facilities were decent but didn't quite make up for the other shortcomings.

reviews.positives: The resort has beautiful view and good ocean access.  The facility is clean and good.
reviews.negatives: We had air condition problem in one of our 2 rooms for more than a day before you finally figured out what it was to fix.  The tennis / pickleball court can use more shade if possible.  It was too hot!

reviews.title: More like a 3 star resort with 5 star pricing
reviews.text: After staying at another resort on Phu quoc Pullman was like staying at a 3 star resort with 5 star pricing the gardens and surrounds are beautiful but the rooms were poorly kept for the price we paid I expect better! Our jacuzzi spa tub didn’t work and had to have maintenance come out 3 days out of the 5 we stayed to fix they finally fixed it but the plug leaked that much you had to keep the taps which were in poor condition and didn’t work peoples running to keep the water level up. Then after having no working tub for 3 days when my partner dropped a coffee cup and broke it they still had the cheek to charge us $200,000 vnd for the damage! Almost laughable to pay $12 aus dollars for a broken cup when the bath in our room didn’t work! The prices of everything where overpriced they advertised a nanny service I was given pricing and when we went to booked they msged me a day later to say they no longer have a licence for nanny service! And there kids club whilst it looks aesthetically  pleasing its not practical & really nothing in. There for yeh kids to do a telly some cushions and a dangerous slide not to mention it closes at 4.30pm so you can’t go out and enjoy an adults only dinner at the very over priced mad cow restaurant as they don’t have kids club or nanny service. Honestly  don’t waste your money there are better resorts on Phu quoc than Pullman they are a long way off the mark toilets in the main salt & pepper restaurant are in need of a thorough deep clean in the corners and around the edges of the floor no attention to detail same goes in the rooms the vanities and bathrooms were not to the standard of a 5 star resort.

reviews.title: Mixed feelings about our stay
reviews.text:
We had mixed impressions during our stay at Pullman Phu Quoc.

Location:
The resort is beautifully located on a quiet beachfront, but it’s quite remote. You’ll need to rely on Grab for access to restaurants, shops, and other attractions. There is a shuttle, but it runs infrequently.

Rooms:
The room design is elegant, and we especially appreciated the Japanese-style toilet – a rare luxury outside of Japan!
That said, we were very surprised that the hotel couldn’t provide two rooms next to each other for our family (with two small children and grandparents), despite booking both rooms together. In a large resort with so many rooms, we expected this to be a basic standard. Out of all the hotels we stayed at during our two-month trip through Vietnam, this was the only one that didn’t manage to arrange that.
Even worse, on the last two days, we were placed between two rooms of a family with four children – extremely noisy due to the thin walls.

Pool & Beach:
The main pool is fantastic – spacious and ideal for kids thanks to the large shallow area. There’s also a small water playground, but it feels underwhelming, and surprisingly there’s no slide.
The beach is beautiful, with a gentle entry into the sea – great for families.

Breakfast:
The breakfast was a highlight – delicious, with a wide and fresh selection, and served until 11am (perfect for late risers). However, during lychee season in Vietnam, it was disappointing to be served the lowest-quality lychees in a 5-star resort.
Also, there were long queues for breakfast every single morning because there simply weren’t enough tables for the number of guests. That really shouldn’t happen at a resort of this category.

Kids Club:
The Kids Club could really use an upgrade. The toys and play options are limited compared to other resorts – for example, there’s no play kitchen, which our son usually loves.

Other Notes:
A major downside was that food delivery via Grab is not allowed – a real issue for families with small kids who often need specific meals. The resort food is overpriced and not always child-friendly.
Poolside dining was also underwhelming – our food took more than 30 minutes to arrive and was almost cold.
Throughout our stay, there were multiple construction and renovation works going on in various areas of the resort, which were noisy and disturbing. Instead of running all these works in parallel while guests are staying, it might be more appropriate to temporarily close the resort and carry out the renovations properly.
Overall, we found the staff to be professional but not particularly warm or welcoming.

Conclusion:
At this price point and 5-star level, we expected more. Many small issues added up and impacted our overall experience.

reviews.title: Below average.
reviews.text:
First of all we appreciate the hard work some staffs put in trying to make our stay as good as it possibly could. The small birthday decor & the birthday cake were very sweet. There are some feedback below that we hope might help the hotel to improve; & be helpful review for other potential guests: 
- the room we got looked tired. Stained sofa, stained bathroom door, stained basins, stained grout tiles, sticky floor…really take the luxury out of the “5” star hotel that they brand themselves to be. Thank goodness the bed sheets were stainless.
- the temperature of the AC in the room doesn’t change no matter what temperature we set it to. At 25 degree Celsius the room is very damp. One could feel it on the bedsheets, it wasn’t very comfortable to sleep in. 
- flashing LED light from the smoke detector in the room, on the ceiling above the bed once lights are off in the room. Very annoying to the eyes. Perhaps it can be taped up? 
- weak water pressure. 
- a “sunset bike tour” activity that we excitedly signed up for turned out to be just bicycles you could borrow from the hotel so to do your own biking around. No “tour” as such. Even instructions as to where to initially meet for the presumed “sunset bike tour” were a confusing ‘next to the pool’/ ‘by the pool’, ‘at the pool’ from 3 different staffs, as if they had forgotten how big their pool is, failing to tell us exactly where the bicycles are or that there is actually no such thing as a “sunset bike tour”. 
- we rsvp & got our tickets for the hotel’s shuttle bus to go to nearby Sonasea. When we turned up on time along with other guests, we waited for a good 10 minutes before a couple staffs turned up trying to work out something. No actual announcement informing us that there’ll be no shuttle bus. The next thing we know we were being packed into a Grab taxi in a chaotic & disorderly fashion. 6 of us strangers being cramped into a tight 6 seaters. One older gentleman who rode with us was someone with a leg brace but the staffs were too busy with their disorganization one of them kept asking him to climb to the back of the car! We shuffled amongst ourselves for him to be seated at the front passenger seat. This mismanagement on the shuttle bus service actually had us late for our massage appointment & got us really nervous about the airport shuttle we had booked. 
- one afternoon at the beach, the yellow flag was up, yet for the 2 hours we were there, no lifeguards were to be seen. It’s quite worrisome. 
- the lack of hospitality service at the beach is also taking stars away from this purported “5” star establishment. 

Now some positives: 
- majority of the staffs were friendly & polite & made us felt welcomed, from the gardeners to restaurant staffs. 
- special mention about the excellent Vietnamese food at the Beach House.
reviews.response:

We’re sorry to hear that some aspects of your visit did not meet your expectations. Unfortunately, the availability of beach activities such as kayaking depends heavily on sea conditions, and safety remains our top priority. We understand it was disappointing not to be able to enjoy it during your three-night stay.

Your comments about the buggy waiting time and the shuttle bus schedule (from 5:00 PM to 8:00 PM) are well noted. We are always looking for ways to improve our services and will review these points to enhance guest convenience.

We appreciate your kind words about our team and facilities, and we hope to welcome you back to enjoy even more memorable moments at Pullman Phu Quoc Beach Resort.

Ki

reviews.title: Good price value
reviews.text: First, we enjoyed our stay. On the 3 areas, 1.Hardware/cleaniness 2.Location/beach and 3.Service. I will start with the Service. It is a busy hotel (at least at the time we were there, 4/24/25) The rooms likley will not be available before 3pm, having asaid that there are plenty of facilities you can use, lunch, pool etc. which are all good. The service at the reception, front door, restaurants are all good - I'll leave it at that since there were no specific mentions/shoutouts. Hardware/cleaniness - Since like the rest of us the most prominent photos of this hotel are the pool and its surroundings, it did not disappoint, it was clean well kept and well designed. The beds were comfortably spread out and it had good shallow areas for kids and a good swim up bar (although it was partially under construction). Overall it met our expectations. The rest of the hardware is good, some wear and tear but overall good. The room was clean, everything works well - TV selection, hot water pressure and supply, room layout etc. 2 small complaints: 1.Make up room wasn't available for us until 5pm (usually), but we had no problem working around that. 2.The shampoo and conditioner (C.O. Bigelow) were not good, it did not feel premium at all (may be just us?). Finally location/beach. Not much around this area, if you and family spends most of your time at the hotel it's all good. To go to the main area of Phu Quoc (center part of the island) about a 20min drive (not too bad). For us, we spent most of our time at Khen beach (20min), again not bad. So just be aware of the travel time. The beach - my only complain. The beach did not meet my expectations. It was not as wide as I would like and there were quite a bit of garbage when I was there. I didn't even take my morning beach walks (as I usually do on these vacations) because of it. Now it could be personal preference and there are planty of nice beaches in Phu Quoc. But it would have been nice if the hotel beach was a bit nicer. So overall good price value, good family hotel, a bit off the beaten path but nevertheless a good stay.
reviews.response:

reviews.title: Super DJ an der Strandbar- danke für die super Musik
reviews.positives:
- Großes Zimmer mit offenem Waschbeckenbereich-wie abgebildet
- bequeme Betten
- nettes Lobbydesign
- Frühstück: viele unerschiedliche Gerichte
- Frühstückspersonal: sprechen und verstehen Englisch!!!!
- Bar im Strandbereich: Unser absolutes Highlight war eine DJ-Frau. Sie hat leider nur an 2 Nachmittagen( 16:30 bis 19:00h) für spitzen Musik und Stimmung gesorgt. Die Bar ist ein wunderbarer Ort für den Sunset. Hier wäre es toll gewesen, wenn man auch ein Abendessen hätte bestellen können- nur Snacks möglich. Aber super Discomusik!!!
reviews.negatives:
- leider musste wir uns für einen Frühstücksplatz anstellen ( leider High Season für Koreanische und Russische Ferienzeit)
- keine schön gestalteter Beachbereich: es gab genau 13 Stück Sonnenschirme!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!, Liegen waren alle an einem Ort zu eng aufgestellt, zu wenige Auflagen, Beachboy schaute den ganzen Tag nur ins Handy, keine Cabanen, keine Hängematten, keine Zonen für ruhesuchende Paare, keine Dusche in Liegenähe, keine aktive Sandpflege und Säuberung,..
- der Sand am Strand in Wassernähe wurde mit einem Mittel behandelt: war leicht grau eingefärbt und quitschte beim Darübergehen und färbte die Fußsohlen und Badeschuhe leicht grau!!!
- Sauberkeit: Das Frühstücksangebot ist sehr groß und auch lecker: Aber die Atmosphäre gleicht einer Mastanstalt. Wir saßen immer draußen im Terrassenbereich: Leider wurden 6 Tage lang die Böden unter den Frühstückstischen nicht gereinigt. Ebenso die Ritzen der Holztische wurden nicht gesäubert- dort liegen Zigarettenreste und Speisereste
- Reinigung: die Außenbereiche: Bodenbeläge  vor den Zimmertrakten und Liften: sind schmutzig 
- Reinigungspersonal für Zimmer: scheint überfordert zu sein- bei uns wurde immer wieder mein loses Bettcover entfernt und irgendwo im Zimmer zusammengequetscht liegengelassen oder entfernt...!
- Die Kategoriepunkte  werden erfüllt, aber es fehlt jedoch jene Stimmungen und Erlebnisse, die den Aufenthalt schön und besonders machen.
- Rezeption: wir kamen um 1:30h morgens vom Flughafen an- kein freundliche Hallo , keine Freundlichkeit
- Radverleih am Pool: eine wahre Katastrophe-zu viele kaputte Räder, nicht gewartet,.....zu niedrig eingestellte Sattel, kein Werkzeug vor Ort, kein Wille spürbar die Räder zu servicieren!!!!!
- Lärmschutz zu den angrenzenden Zimmern: wir hatten im Nachbarzimmer eine Familie mit Kleinkind, welches so ab 24:00h heftig schrie, war super gut zu hören....

reviews.title: Fabulous beach with full sunset
reviews.text:
The resort locates at the long beach with beautiful sunset everyday. The facilities generally are new, especially the pool is great with trees around. We stayed in a front beach cabana, its space is quite big equiped a jacuzzi tub. Cuisine in the 3 restaurants is served at fine dining price with OK taste.
Some uncomfortable items are: 
1. The toilet bowl was installed higher position for western guests which caused muscle tension to many shorter asian guests.
2. Pet control shall be taken in good care as we hit many types of bug / fly from restaurant to room, especially at night.
3. The staffs are very friendly, however they have to be trained more and more to provide a professional 5-star service, including the (deputy) managers. We sometimes felt they don't want us to spend our money on their services by very slow action or ignored response; for some orders of in-room food and beverage orders, we had to guide them on how to bring the glasses of draught beer to our room safely. Besides, although we have informed and ordered for our anniversary event 2 prior days, it seems we had to beg for their organization.
Anyway, it can be still in our choice next time as an option in low priority.

reviews.title: Enjoying the pool + ocean + sunset view.
reviews.text: The resort near Sonasea Night Market has a good overall feel, with a relatively large pool and clear water. I stayed for three nights; breakfast had plenty of options, but there wasn't much variation each day, and the dining area felt a bit cramped. The hotel provides several shuttle buses for airport transfers daily, but there is only one shuttle bus to and from Sonasea Night Market and Downtown each day, so I suggest enhancing this convenient service. The hotel room has enough light and a sense of space, with a terrace offering views of the pool, sea, and sunset, which was very enjoyable. However, the air conditioning needs improvement, as one might feel the airflow directed towards the head while sleeping, which is uncomfortable, and the controls cannot adjust to an ideal temperature, affecting sleep quality. It is worth mentioning that the hotel offers nurse services; when I informed the receptionist about a family member's stomach discomfort upon checking in, a nurse was promptly arranged. Upon arriving at the room, the nurse was already there, and after some communication, she provided the necessary medication, showing thoughtful service. Lastly, the beach outside the hotel has relatively large waves, so the pool might be more suitable for swimming.
reviews.response: Dear KA, we appreciate your comments about your recent stay at Pullman Phu Quoc Beach Resort. We are delighted to hear that you enjoyed the spacious pool, the room comfort with terrace views as well as especially the thoughtful nurse service. At the same time, we are grateful for your constructive feedback regarding the breakfast selection, restaurant seating, shuttle service, and room air conditioning. I will share your comments with relevant teams as we continuously strive to improve guest comfort and convenience. Sincerely, Kim Nguyen, Guest Experience Officer.

reviews.title: Schönes Hotel mit viel Luft nach oben
reviews.positives:
Sehr schöne und große Hotelanlage mit Pool und eigenem Strandzugang. Wir hatten die Cabana mit privatem Poolzugang gebucht. Es war traumhaft und ist den Preis wert.
Das Hotel befindet sich in einem etwas abgelegenen Hotel Resort. In ca 20 min Fußweg kann man eine Walking street erreichen, in der viele Restaurants und ein Foodmarket sind. Das Frühstücksbuffet ist sehr groß und bietet so ziemlich alles das man sich wünschen kann, man sollte aber frühzeitig zum Frühstück kommen, sonst muss man länger warten.
reviews.negatives:
Es wird  ab dem Check-in ständig versucht einem  den ALL Acor-Club aufzudrängen. Für einen Europäer der nur hin und wieder in Asien unterwegs ist, zahlt sich das allerdings nie aus. Die Getränke kosten ohne dieser Club- Mitgliedschaft 3 Mal so viel wie in anderen Hotels. Ich bin nicht bereit für eine sonst übliche Leistung noch mehr Geld zu bezahlen. Vor allem nicht für schlechtes Service.

Am Anreisetag wollen wir abends in Restaurant noch eine Kleinigkeit essen und ließen uns einen Tisch geben. Leider war das Restaurantpersonal nicht in der Lage uns innerhalb von 20 Minuten zu bedienen bzw auch nur zu fragen was wir trinken möchten. Sie waren in einem leeren Restaurant völlig überfordert. Als wir dann den Tisch und das Restaurant verlassen wollen, lief uns eine Mitarbeiterin nach weil wir noch zahlen müssten. Wir haben ihr dann erklärt, dass wir nicht bedient wurden und daher nun wieder gehen.
Von einem Pullman Hotel hätte ich mir mehr und besseren  Kundenservice erwartet.

reviews.title: Pullman Phu Quoc
reviews.text: Wonderful room with a nice bathtub. My toddlers enjoyed it very much. There is a kids' club play area with a slide and toys under 4 will need a parent to be with them. The breakfast has nice selections from noodles(pho), soup, pastries, sushi, ice cream, fruit juices, to Vietnamese coffee.  The swimming pool is great, and there is a vast area for toddlers! Some areas are heated too. Also, it has a private beach with a nice sunset view. Shuttle buses to and fro airport and to the town.
reviews.response: Dear Pamelyn, thank you very much for taking the time to share your wonderful feedback regarding your recent stay at Pullman Phu Quoc Beach Resort. We are thrilled to hear that you and your family enjoyed your time with us from the comfortable room and bathtub to the fun-filled kids’ club and toddler-friendly pool areas. It’s especially gratifying to know that the variety at our breakfast spread and the relaxing private beach with sunset views added to your experience. Your kind words about our facilities, shuttle service, and overall environment are truly appreciated, and I will be sure to share them with our entire team. Feedback like yours motivates us to continue providing memorable stays for all our guests. We look forward to welcoming you and your family back soon for another enjoyable and relaxing stay.

reviews.negatives: Unsere Suite war sehr klamm und roch muffig. Auch ein Duftspender hat keine Abhilfe geschaffen.  Die Bettdecken und Kleidung war ständig leicht feucht. Daher war der Schlaf sehr unangenehm. Der Strand hat wunderschönen weißen Sand. Hatte aber sehr viel Müll um Wasser. Wir waren danach nicht wieder am Strand. Trotzdem können wir das Hotel empfehlen.

reviews.title: Lovely family suite
reviews.text:
We stayed in a family suite and the main room was very nice. Spacious and clean.
Staffs were friendly and nice. 
A bit of communication hiccups at times but manageable. 
Spa was great, had a 90-min deep tissue massage. Breakfast and food at salt and pepper restaurant were also good, however we stayed 5 nights so we did become a bit of bored of it. But it is easy to call a Grab and go visit nearby local restaurants for a change.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Super schöne Anlage

reviews.title: Ks has both advantages and disadvantages.
reviews.text: The male staff member who accompanied us to the airport was very enthusiastic and took care of us until we completed the check-in process. The room was comfortable, but the bathtub in room 4019 was broken and could not be used due to a water leak. I don't find the hotel location convenient as there are no amenities around. The swimming pool is designed well for families with small children, gradually transitioning from shallow to deep; my child really enjoyed the pool here. One drawback for the hotel is that there is a shuttle service to take guests to the center for entertainment, but when I checked in at 4 PM, by 5 PM when I reported to register, the staff said there were no more vehicles available. I evaluate the hotel's readiness to serve as not high. The breakfast was better than at Sheraton and Premier Residence, and the female staff member at the breakfast area was also very enthusiastic!

reviews.title: Wunderschönes Hotel Erlebnis
reviews.positives:
Das Personal war sehr freundlich und bemüht/ engagiert auch wenn viele eine englisch Schule bekommen sollten.(nach den zahlreichen Beschwerden bei booking haben sie sich wohl das zu Herzen genommen)
Das Zimmer war sehr geschmackvoll und bequem eingerichtet.
Die Anlage und der Poolbereich sind wunderschön und gepflegt. 
Der Strandbereich ich auch sehr sauber und gepflegt. Auch die Anzahl der Liegen wurde erhöht und hat genug Plätze geboten.
MAD Cow Restaurant hat fantastisches Essen. Solch ein Essen Bzw in der Qualität sollte es überall geben.
reviews.negatives:
Der jacuzzi / Whirlpool riecht komisch. Die Verständigung mit manchen Mitarbeitern auch englisch ist etwas schwer. Das könnte mit einem einfachen Englischkurs mit wiederholdenden Abfragen gelöst werden.
Bei den Frühstückstischen sollte auf jedem Platz ein Set Salz Pfeffer stehen, schließlich heißt das Restaurant auch so.
Beim Frühstück wird zu schnell abgeräumt. Man muss aufpassen dass einem die Teller nicht beim verlassen des Tisches abgeräumt werden.
In den Restaurant sollte es authentische vietnamesische Speisen geben, alles was es hier gibt kann man und will man nicht im Urlaub weiter essen wie in der Heimat. Wir wurden die vietnamesischen einfach noch hochwertiger kochen um es a den standart des Hotels anzupassen. So könnte man bei der pho bo nur Rinder Filet anbieten.

reviews.title: Hotel with no activity after 6pm
reviews.text:
Beautiful rooms, sparkling clean and beautiful design.

Drawbacks - the bed is way too firm, we both found it too hard for 3 days, no activities at all after sunset ( not that before it's lively)

reviews.title: Entspannung pur
reviews.positives:
Sehr herzliche und freundliche Mitarbeitende. Der Check-In verlief schnell und hilfreich. 
Kostenlose Shuttles von/zum Flughafen und in die nächst größere Stadt. 
Die Anlage, der Pool, der Strand sind sehr ruhig, super gepflegt sowie sauber.
Das Zimmer war traumhaft, wir waren im 6. Stock in einem Premium Deluxe Zimmer mit Meerblick und Balkon. 
An der Beach Bar hat ein DJ aufgelegt und zum Entspannen eingeladen.
Fußläufig gab es Supermärkte ein Street Food Market, v.a. mit Fischspeißen. 

An zwei Abenden haben wir bei Salt & Pepper gegessen. Die Portionsgröße waren ordentlich. Die Bedienungen waren nett aber manchmal etwas zu wenig und mussten gut rennen.

Das Restaurant im obersten Stockwerk Mad Cow ist absolut empfehlenswert, die Bedienungen waren sehr zuvorkommend und aufmerksam. Unsere Bedienung hier (leider ist mir der Name entfallen) war perfekt, wir haben Empfehlungen erhalten und wurden auf das anstehende Feuerwerk hingewiesen und haben on Top noch nettes rund um Land, Leute, Kultur und Essen erhalten 😊 ein perfekter Abschluss unseres Aufenthaltes.
reviews.negatives:
Im Restaurant Salt & Pepper waren die Bedienungen mehr als gut ausgelastet. So kam es verständlicherweise zu verlängerten Wartezeiten bei der Bestellaufnahme und der Lieferung. reviews.title: We love our room and the staffs
reviews.text: We love our room and the staffs. But for my travel experiences around the world I think your resort could do much better with some activities like a small bar counter with music RIGTH AT THE BEACH and a few tables and seats so people could do drinking and enjoy sunbath or sunset as your resort has a wonderful private beach with sunset, and actually should have one counter at the pool too ( rather than wait for the staffs to come to order ). Also there should be some outdoor tables for breakfast areas, people would love that atmosphere in the morning . All above suggestions will enlarge your F&B income, i hope there ll be some small changes for my next visit. Overall, thank you very much for a good experience there !

Now for negatives I found the bed rock hard in fact same everywhere in Vietnam 
The Aircon I'd put at max 28 and it kept dropping back to 20 so it was freezing actually woke up with worst headache of my life from it..
I informed them but staff member attends explaining up and down on control he doesn't think I have Air con in a hot country? 
The door didn't close properly and they definitely knew about it as showed me trick on closing upon check-in I came back to room numerous times and wife wasnt aware door wasnt locked
I got to be honest here I didn't find the service that great from staff some were very friendly and some werent it doesn't normally bother me but if Im paying exorbitant rates I expect the service with it..

reviews.title: The Pullman Resort on Puquok Island is great.
reviews.text:
I spent the last part of my 14-night, 15-day tour in Phu Quoc Island with 1 night at Pullman Cabana and 1 night in a suite. During that time, I moved between 7 different accommodations including hotels, resorts, apartments, and villas, and I chose Pullman Resort as the final one because I had high expectations. It's a wonderful resort hotel and I'm very satisfied with the price. 

One memorable experience was seeing a huge frog swimming in the cabana pool at night, and another was when my wife and I were having a drink on the terrace and a staff member suddenly opened the door and came in, saying it was a service and handed us chocolates, which was quite shocking. The only downside was that there was no small mart within the resort, so we had to drive out for that.

reviews.title: Mixed feelings
reviews.text:
Only a day into our visit. Not sure why Agoda ask for reviews during stays ..
Anyway, I gave three stars as I could give 5 for some things and 1 for others. 
We had a terrible first (and so far only night). That was due to a very drunk Korean female guest in next room. After 1 hour and 40 mins of noise and drama and many calls to reception, we were asked if we wanted to move as the crazy lady wouldn't. At 11.40pm. No thanks. 

That's obviously an odd situation. The handling was poor. But I have sympathy. 

A few other "nearly but not quite" moments and I'm still at 3 stars.

There are 4 more nights. I could end up hating this place or not wanting to leave. 

Wonderful location and sweet staff who mostly are doing their best.
reviews.response:
Dear Our Valued Guest,

Thank you for sharing your honest feedback with us. We truly appreciate you taking the time to share both the positive and challenging aspects of your stay.

We sincerely apologize for the disturbance you experienced on your first night. We understand how frustrating it must have been, and we’re sorry that our response didn’t meet your expectations in that moment. Your comfort and peace during your stay are incredibly important to us, and we will certainly review how we can better handle such situations moving forward.

We’re glad to hear that you’re enjoying our beautiful location and the efforts of our friendly staff, and we hope that the remainder of your stay improves. Should any further issues arise, please don’t hesitate to reach out to me directly—I’m here to ensure your stay becomes the relaxing experience you deserve.

Thank you again for your understanding, and we look forward to turning your experience around in the days to come.

Warm regards,
Xuan N

However, even with the air conditioning and ceiling fan, the room feels a bit humid. The restaurant and rooms generally have a somewhat dark atmosphere and the breakfast isn't as great as recommended, but considering the drawbacks, I feel satisfied enough to want to come back again^^

We appreciate your observations about the room’s humidity and the ambiance of the restaurant and room. Your comments are invaluable, and we will look into these areas to make improvements for future guests. We also take note of your feedback on the breakfast and will review it to enhance the variety and quality.

Despite these issues, we’re pleased that you felt satisfied and had a good time overall. We look forward to the opportunity to welcome you back and hope to exceed your expectations on your next visit.

If you have any specific requests or need assistance with your next stay, please don’t hesitate to reach out.

Best regards,
Xuan Nguyen
Guest Experience Manager.

reviews.title: Great Resort but not food is disappointing
reviews.text:
I recently visited the Pullman and most of the things are great about the resort. They have an excellent swimming pool, a very good and clean beach, along with well-maintained property. The only thing that disappoints is the food options for Indians and vegetarians. Most things are with Pork and Beef, which Indians do not eat, and surviving every day on bread is not possible. They should have added some curry or Paratha, or Idli option, or any indian breakfast. Even 2 items would have solved the purpose. In case they do not have indian options, adding pasta, spaghetti, and pizza could have solved this issue for vegetarians. The food was a big letdown for us.

But rooms, swimming pool, kids room for activities etc were top notch.

reviews.title: I had a comfortable stay for 7 nights.
reviews.text:
I debated whether to book a full 7-night stay... but it was really great. Of course, there were pros and cons. I arrived about an hour early, and they let me check in early. Upon entering, the cleaning state was acceptable.

I read reviews saying it was humid, and I thought, "Surely with the air conditioning running all day, why?" But there was some kind of unexplained humidity. When I turned down the air conditioning a little, my children were cold, so I only lowered the temperature by 1 degree, and it quickly became humid again. I don't know why, but I wasn't the only one who felt the humidity; my husband felt it too, so we called the staff. After they checked the air conditioning, it was a bit better, but there was definitely humidity.

Also, moms with children need to be cautious about the floor. It's not a floor that dries quickly, and after showering or using the sink, if water splashes, it's very slippery. My two-year-old daughter fell a few times. Even adults slip while wearing indoor slippers. The floor is slippery even right after cleaning. It was so bad that the cleaning staff warned to be careful because the floor was slippery after cleaning. Moms with kids might want to be attentive to this.

The breakfast was delicious! Although there weren't many varieties, it was decent for the price. Since we stayed for 7 nights, it was enough to get a bit repetitive. 

The location is quite empty; there's nothing around. It takes about 5 minutes to call a taxi to get to So Na Shi?? Although it’s a distance you could walk in a place like Seoul, there were zero people walking around, and with nothing nearby to see, I wouldn't recommend walking.

The swimming pool is very spacious, and the sea is close by. The staff were friendly! We utilized the kids' club program, and it was nice that the children engaged with each other when they started to get bored. They would meet at the pool and play together, which was convenient for the moms!

On the last day, we wanted a late checkout until 2 PM. It was free until 1 PM, but when I requested another hour, they said it would be an additional 30%. I had requested a free hour for checkout the day before, but at 12 PM, they called asking why we weren't leaving. Haha, I guess it wasn’t confirmed. This may vary, so it's best to check in advance.

I think we will use this place again, but probably not for 7 nights. It was good for the price! I might have listed many downsides, but I hope this helps. Our family of four was satisfied with the resort!
reviews.response:
Dear ranmi,

Thank you for choosing Pullman Phu Quoc for your family vacation and for taking the time to share such detailed feedback.

We are glad to hear that you appreciated the early check-in, the cleanliness of the room, the spacious pool, and the friendly staff. It is also wonderful that your children enjoyed the kids’ club and made friends during their stay.

We do understand your concerns regarding the humidity and the floor slipperiness. The rainy season can indeed increase humidity levels, and we will continue to explore ways to improve guest comfort. We also appreciate your safety note about the floors and will remind our team to ensure extra care when cleaning to help prevent slipping.

Regarding breakfast, we aim to balance variety with quality, but we understand staying for several days can make it feel repetitive, and we will consider ways to keep it fresh for longer stays.

For the late check-out, we apologize for any confusion. Our policy can vary depending on occupanc

reviews.text:
Stayed here for a week, was a great base.. Spent a few days just around the hotel and a couple days exploring the island.
Note - Agoda says there is a sauna, this is not really accurate as the sauna is only available for those who do spa treatments.
Also - note the airport<>hotel transfer is not on demand, but on a fixed schedule (which means up to a 2 hour wait, we we not informed of this in advance and it wasn't a great start)
Breakfast is terrific and the staff at the breakfast restaurant are really nice.
The semi-private beach is awesome as is the pool.
If you want to enjoy water, this is a great spot to be!

Thank you again for your valuable feedback, and we hope to welcome you back soon for another relaxing stay!

Warm regards,
Xuan Nguyen

We loved the pool bar🩵 it is super close to the airport and the reception staff speak ok English but the other staff cannot speak that well so keep that in mind. Beach was quite empty with some rubbish around but we spent so much time at the pool so barely went to the beach. Breakfast buffet was good and they had mangos in the fridge. Overall would recommend!
reviews.response:
Dear Gyuhee 

We sincerely appreciate you taking the time to give your feedback regarding your recent stay at Pullman Beach Resort Phu Quoc 
We are delighted to know that you enjoyed our room and pool very much. Thank you for your precious words for the excellent service and communication skill of our reception  staff. Rest assured that the compliments will reach the whole team to keep them motivated in maintaining the quality service.
The beach is severely affected by the island's harsh climate, such as strong winds and rains. Please be informed that we are now executing the necessary maintenance on all facilities at the beach to avoid the rubbish
We hope to welcome you back to improve your experience.
Best regards and safe travels,
Pieter DE WEERD | General Manager

reviews.title: Pullman brand
reviews.text:
Has been in many hotels and resorts of Pullman brand , all are good, the design is charming, in tune. At Pullman Phu Quoc, the beach is beautiful, a bit far from the high-rise area, but there is a elec-car  that takes you away,very  good for those who like to walk, The beach is very beautiful, the staff is friendly and enthusiastic. The minus point is that guests arrive early before 12 pm, there is no restaurant or cafe, service counter for guests to use because they have to wait until 12 noon.
The equipment in the room is modern, beautiful and comfortable

reviews.title: Book Cabana Suite. Super Private and 3 min walk to the beach
reviews.text: The resort is well positioned. Only 15 min from the airport and 20 min from the Southern part of the island. The community pool is very nice and they have a delicious restaurant in Mad Cow. We recommend booking cabana suite which is absolutely beautiful. Have your own jacuzzi in the room + steps to a private pool and 3 min walk from the beach. Despite limited staff due to pandemic recovering the manager and staff did a great job in making our experience memorable

reviews.text: Very good service in general, room is good and the staff are very friendly and tentative! We had a great time here.
reviews.response:
Thân gửi Hieu,

Chúng tôi vô cùng biết ơn vì những ý kiến đóng góp của quý khách liên quan tới thời gian quý khách nghỉ tại Pullman Phu Quoc Beach Resort. Mọi ý kiến phản hồi tích cực đều mang lại niềm vui cho chúng tôi.

Tôi sẽ chia sẻ ý kiến đóng góp của quý khách với đội ngũ nhân viên của mình. Tôi chắc chắn rằng ý kiến phản hồi này sẽ là nguồn động viên khích lệ đối với toàn bộ tập thể nhân viên của chúng tôi bởi chúng tôi luôn nỗ lực không ngừng nâng cấp chất lượng các dịch vụ của mình.

Sẽ rất tuyệt nếu quý khách có thể dành thời gian để chia sẻ trải nghiệm của mình trên trang TripAdvisor của chúng tôi: https://bit.ly/ReviewAtPullmanPhuQuoc

Cảm ơn quý khách một lần nữa vì đã chia sẻ cảm nhận của quý khách và chúng tôi hy vọng chuyến đi lần tới của quý khách cũng sẽ dễ chịu như các chuyến đi trước.

Trân trọng và chúc quý khách nhiều sức khỏe,
Pieter DE WEERD | Tổng Quản Lý
Khu nghỉ dưỡng Pullman Phú Quốc

reviews.title: Everything is perfect, so there's no need to be envious of Hawaii! Full satisfaction!
reviews.text:
My child loves swimming, so we booked a cabana, and it was an excellent choice! Getting around the hotel using a buggy was easy, and the yellow point main pool was beautiful, but the best part was the well-maintained private beach; I think I mentioned at least ten times that I didn't envy Hawaii at all!

Rather than going to the expensive Waikiki Beach! We kept saying how nice, pretty, and delicious it was, and that we should come back here!

Pros:
It's beautiful, luxurious, friendly, convenient, and great for photos!
Especially the life-changing mango bingsu is incredibly delicious, and the breakfast, sunset, and beach were all perfect! The best!

Cons:
The nearby area is like a desolate ghost town ;;
That's why I deducted one star for the location.
Otherwise, there are no downsides.
reviews.response:
Dear JIENUN,

Thank you so much for sharing your wonderful experience with us. We are truly delighted to hear that your stay with your family was so enjoyable and that the cabana room, our facilities, breakfast, sunset views, and even the mango shaved ice helped create such special memories. It’s fantastic to know that you felt everything was convenient and that our buggy service made getting around easy.

At the same time, we sincerely appreciate your feedback regarding the surrounding area. While our resort is designed as a peaceful beachfront retreat, we understand your comments and will continue to support our guests with transportation options and assistance whenever needed.

Thank you once again for your kind words. We look forward to welcoming you and your family back for another memorable stay at Pullman Phu Quoc Beach Resort,

Warm regards,
Kim Nguyen
Guest Experience Supervisor

Очень обидно прилететь на море и не иметь возможности полежать на шезлонге на берегу :(  на мое недовольство менеджмент принес фрукты в номер, что очень мило, но пляж от этого доступнее не стал

reviews.title: Great resort wedged between North & South Phu Quoc
reviews.text:
We loved our 8 night stay @ the Pullman, the hotel was great with the pool a major drawcard perfect for our little one to play in the shallows. We stayed in a bungalow which although a little more $$ it was nice to be separated from the main hotel block. 

Food options and breakfast were fantastic 

Location is the slight downfall however inexpensive Grab taxi’s make the hotel easily accessible to the North & South of the island. 

Staff were great, very friendly and helpful
reviews.response:
Dear Sunil,

Thank you very much for choosing to stay with us and for taking the time to share your experience. We are delighted to hear that you enjoyed your stay and that the pool was a highlight, especially for your little one to have fun in the shallow area.

We are also glad that you liked the cabana and appreciated the added privacy away from the main hotel building. It is wonderful to know that our breakfast and food options met your expectations and that our friendly team made your stay even more comfortable.

We understand that our location may feel a little less central, and we appreciate your understanding. 

Thank you again for your kind words. We hope to have the pleasure of welcoming you back for another memorable stay at Pullman Phu Quoc Beach Resort.

Warm regards,
Duong Nguyen
Guest Experience Manager

reviews.positives:
Оцениваю данный отель на 10 из 10.
Он идеально продуман для отдыха для семей с детьми:
- стильная ухоженная территория с множеством пальм и красивых растений,
- две детские площадки - одна обычная с  детскими сооружениями, другая водная с фонтанчиками и водными фигурками,
- инфинити- бассейн с очень теплой водой и малышовой зоной + джакузи,
- песчаный пляж и пологий вход в океан,
- детское меню в ресторане,
- машинки, которые приезжают за отдыхающими, если сам не хочешь идти…
Добавлю, что для взрослых есть хороший тренажерный зал, игры на пляже, теннисная площадка, спа-процедуры и массаж (рекомендую сходить на часовой массаж)
Уже планирую в следующем году вернуться на отдых в этот отель!))

reviews.title: Обязательно вернусь снова!!
reviews.positives:
Процедура заезда - быстро, четко, качественно, заселили немного раньше срока, что было очень приятно! особо хочется отметить работу персонала - с момента приезда ты находишься под полной опекой сотрудников.

Очень красивая и ухоженная территория - чистая, зеленая и хорошо продуманная, виден кропотливый труд садовников. Чистый пляж - его убирали после шторма с самого раннего утра и до позднего вечера.

Номер - выше всяких похвал. Есть все для комфортной жизни, все продумано до мелочей.

Завтрак - хороший выбор, качественная еда, четкое и внимательное обслуживание со стороны официантов и сотрудников ресторана, чистота, открытая кухня. Заказные блюда - высокая скорость обслуживания, хорошее качество, большие порции. Качественный кофе, что немаловажно, как выяснилось.

Бассейн - чистый, ухоженный, великолепно работает сервис доставки еды из ресторана, постоянно чувствуется присутствие заботливого персонала.
reviews.negatives: Немного тяжело было подстроиться под график уборки в номерах (только время), немного смущала шумоизоляция - постоянно слышали кашляющего и ругающегося соседа.

reviews.title: A good accommodation for a family vacation with kids.
reviews.text: This resort was chosen because it has a large swimming pool and a private beach. The swimming pool has depths ranging from very shallow to 1.4m, making it suitable for both children and adults. There was a short foam party at the pool on Wednesdays and Saturdays, which everyone enjoyed very much. The private beach has strong winds and waves, so be careful if you go in—it might feel like a free pass to the Jordan River. I would rather recommend hopping for a short time instead. The blue sky, pool water, yellow sunbed, and green beach towels make an excellent color combination for photos—any background can give you great shots. Bring pretty and colorful swimsuits instead of rash guards. I brought mosquito repellent, but there were no mosquitoes or bugs at all. Breakfast is prepared for customers from various countries and includes a wide variety of desserts (bread, fruits, drinks) that are delicious. My child said that beef pho and marshmallows were their favorites. The iced Americano I had every morning was non-acidic and nutty, which I enjoyed. If you are pouring down iced coffee from the morning, you are very likely to be Korean. I praised the mango bingsu on my blog, and while it was tasty, it wasn't stunningly delicious enough to need to eat it every day. However, I do recommend trying it at least once; the portion is enough for two people. The QR code ordering system at the pool and in the room is very convenient, and all the staff are very friendly. I wanted to give a perfect score, but I deducted two stars because the shower room and sink weren't clean. The shower room has mold, and the sink needs thorough cleaning. The water pressure wasn’t weak, and there were no issues even without using a shower filter. The gym is also very clean and has a variety of equipment, so I recommend using it. Although the country is humid and both the room and bedding can feel damp, it wasn't a problem at all for living; you adapt quickly. If you call a taxi with Grab, you will arrive at the resort very quickly. The Sonasi Night Market is said to be small, but it has everything you could want and is enjoyable enough, so I recommend visiting at least once. Our whole family was satisfied, and we want to go again on our next visit to Phu Quoc.
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Room, 2 Single Size Beds, Ocean View

reviews.title: It's pretty and perfect for a hotel stay.
reviews.text: Both the south and the north are easy to get around, and it's nice to receive the free pickup service from the massage shop in the city, so it's not too far to go to King Kong Mart. The view is pretty, and with the ocean, it's good for walks. The pool isn’t very diverse, but it's spacious and pretty for taking photos, so I would consider coming back. I stayed on the 8th floor, and it was great to eat and have fun at Mad Cow on the 9th floor. The breakfast was crowded on days when group tours came, but on weekends without group tours, the unlimited mango breakfast was great and the food tasted good. Korean food for my parents was also well-prepared. There were various types of coffee, and it was delicious when ordered. However, the bathroom door was broken, and a child was stuck inside for 30 minutes without an apology for that. Other than that, the staff was friendly and it was clean. There are two separate sinks outside, making it convenient to use.
reviews.room_type: Superior Room, 2 Single Size Beds, Balcony

reviews.title: Тихо, спокойно, для перезагрузки головы.
reviews.positives: Отель из серии Премиум. Малый номерной фонд, красивый холл, вкусные и разнообразные завтраки. Персонал отличный. Нет дискотек сельских по вечерам, как в турецких Риксос и им подобных. Отель находиться в тихом районе. Приятно погулять и прокатиться на велосипеде. Это отдых для расслабления от работы и людей, так как номерной фонд не большой. Люди все культурные. Очень мне запомнились часы проведанные на горшке японского девайса в общественном туалете)) это незабываемо) Седло с подогревом. Я был счастлив)))) Жаль такого не было в номере)) Да, и бассейн. Он очень чистый и уютный.
reviews.negatives:
1. Номера подустали. Ванная отличная, но уставшая. Спальная не понятно по какому принципу создавалась, но мне не хватало мягкого покрытия на полу и мебели. Прыгать с кровати в тапки не очень для меня. Коврики или мягкая зона там необходима.  Пустая зона рядом с телевизором, не уютно. Балкон простой, как в тройке. Хотелось бы такие мелочи иметь в номере. Все таки он не из дешевых. 
2. Ресторан, завышен по стоимости. Их там два. На первом и последнем этаже. Если вы захотите поесть, то либо часть из того что готовят на завтраках на первом этаже , но за плату, либо дорого и в Американском стиле, грили, бургеры на 9 этаже. Еда хорошая, но дорогая и не разнообразная. 
3. Отель был заполнен на половину от силы, но в день выезда ресепшен стал торопить с выселением. Меня это очень удивило. Позвонили в 11.30, хотя я ориентировался на выезд в 12.00 и собирался. К чему такая нервозность и спешка мне не понятно. Какое то странное отношение к гостям. При заселение чай и салфетка для рук, а при выезде, торопят и такое чувство что уже и не нужен такой гость у которого закончилась бронь. Видимо не рассчитывают что он вернётся.

reviews.title: Great value for money, perfect for going with a baby.
reviews.text:
I went with my two-year-old baby.

There was a completely shallow area that was great for playing with the baby, and the food and beverage at the pool bar was really delicious. The kids' club was well set up, and the staff were very friendly and played well with the kids. They also provided beach toys and balls for sand play, which was great.

The only downside is that the bathroom and room are separated by a curtain, which gives a somewhat damp feeling... and there is a slight sense of being somewhat outdated (but it wasn't uncomfortable).

Even after checking out, we could still use all the facilities, so we continued swimming with the baby, took a nice shower at the beach house, and then the airport shuttle to the airport was perfect!

reviews.text: The Pullman was absolutely beautiful to stay in. We had the executive suite with the king size bed and it was breath taking. The breakfast was incredible with a wide range of options and would definitely recommend getting the breaky included.  Staff were friendly and welcoming. Unfortunately, my partner and I got sick (thankfully staying in a beautiful room!) but soon realised that we were going to pay through the nose with the resort prices for food and drinks. $20 AUD for kids serving of 10 chicken nuggets as an example. So while it is beautiful, it was expensive at the resort. But, would recommend to stay!

Drikkevarer havde de havde heller ikke styr på.. Vi oplevede flere gange, at en tjener ikke lyttede eller holdt fokus, når vi bestilte. For os var det ikke et luksus ophold og eller et luksus hotel. Vi var på andre og bedre Resorts med bedre beliggenhed, flottere strand, meget mere ro og nærvær. Maden var bedre, servicen var højere - selvom prisen var næsten halv pris - Pullman var desværre ikke det ophold vi drømte om og ikke noget for os. Det var simplehen al for påtaget, så meget, at det blev irriterende...Vi kommer ikke igen...

reviews.title: Very disappointing for a 5 star hotel
reviews.positives:
First of all the whole hotel looks old, with weird room design. You have the toilet and the shower in the room without the full door, which feels like a private washroom inside the room, plus the lack of intimacy.
Other than that the hol ways of the building close to the pool and garden are not clean at all.
The main issue was with the mold in the room and a heavy smell because of that which made our stay terrible. We asked for a room change the date we arrived, but we got an air refresherner machine which stopped working during the night. The second day they offered another room but in the same building type and had the same smell, so didn’t make sense to move. After that we received in the room a humidifier, which help a bit to breathe better but the smell was still there. And I saw after that other ppl complained and they blame the island humidity, but we were on other hotel in Phu Quoc which didn’t have this issue, so I think is an issue with the whole building and is not property maintained or cleaned.
Also one day after the room was cleaned actually looked more dirtier, the sync and toilet was actually dirtier afterwards.

Plus the prices on bar and restaurant have western prices, but the service is far from that, and you are being charged extra for the service, where for example on the beach bar I payed 10 euros for 2 young cold coconut and I picked and was not even delivered on the beach.
Breakfast needs more vegetarian options.
Very disappointed and not close to a 5 star hotel, and will not choose Pullman anymore from now on.

The only good thing was the beach area because was quiet and not that crowded.

reviews.title: Absolutely near perfect for a relaxing holiday
reviews.text:
I stayed 4 days 3 nights in this resort. I am pretty much impressed with most aspects that this resort has to offer. 
Room is very clean, spacious with a comfortable bed and a huge bath tub. I particularly Like the electrical bidet. Room services are very easy. The room deisgn is Modern too. 

Hotels in Vietnam have improved but are still short of small details that Thai is better in, ie taking care of the scents in lobby, trendy music in lobby, welcoming towel to clean guest's hand before a welcome drink. 

Things that can be improved on : 
1. Never ask ur own guests to push their own luggage to their rooms, which should be taken care by the front desk staffs instead. I was shocked when the hotel staff brought us to our luggage and distributed our own luggage to us, so that we could push it to our room ourselves. I would say this doesn't make a good impression from the start of a guest's stay. 

2. Drinking water provided in the room should be in a plastic bottle or environmentally friend bottle instead of glass bottle for good safety reason. I dropped one of the drinking water bottle in the room and the glass bottle shattered into pieces. I had to ask for cleaning service to clean the mess. It could have been avoided if the bottle is made of plastic instead of glass. Safer for family with kids too.

3. The private beach is very good, with toys for kids provided, kayaking activity, jetski services, and photo taking corners. Cocktail drinks are served too. The only thing could have improved on is the cleanliness of the beach, which I found many plastic pieces and wastes in the sands while stepping on it may injure a person's feet if the plastic pieces are sharp. 

4. Access to breakfast buffet can be done better. Guests staying in the villa can enter the buffet area without going through the front desk staffs. This simply means some guests can even have free buffet if went unnoticed ! Some form of barrier can be placed at some entrance during buffet time to overcome
reviews.response:

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: They have a great variety for breakfast. Very nice spread and a pho station (although pretty standard for vietnamese hotels). We tried both the main breakfast and the Mad Cow breakfast and both were very good. Mad Cow comes with specialized mains and drinks so that was a plus for us. Overall, the breakfast was up to standard.
reviews.negatives:
We stayed for three nights. I have to say that our experience was not what we expected . After we checked in, our fridge was not working and they were really slow to send someone to repair it. Our second sink was also not draining. The shower was not hot at all. They sent a maintenance guy the second night to come check out the temperature. The temperature never got higher than 35°C which is lower than body temperature. He was in our room for longer than 30 minutes and he acted like he fixed it and brushed it off, saying that it was the hotel policy to not let the water go higher than 38°C. Needless to say, we also didn’t enjoy our jacuzzi because of the lukewarm water. 

After our first night, the hotel told us that they would change our room if we want to. We told them we would think about it to which he responded that he would have the room on standby for us. After an hour or so, we got back to him saying that we would like to make the switch. He said that the room was booked while we were considering. (Shocking). We were all packed, ready for the switch! Over promised and under delivered is our impression which is very disappointing. 

The overall facilities were fine, exactly what you would expect from a five star hotel. However, when we were at the pool, we were told  to wait 20 minutes for towels. It was minor, we could wait. But the service was just not good enough for a five star hotel. The staff’s English was also not great. We had to use Google translate most of the time. 

We stayed at the Movenpick hotel before Pullman and we were more satisfied with our stay there. Which is surprising considering Pullman is more expensive.

reviews.title: Good facilities and wonderful staff, but constant loud, thumping music has put us off coming back!
reviews.positives: Room was a decent size, well laid out and beds very comfortable. Breakfast buffet had an excellent choice and was constantly replenished right up until end of service. Location of hotel is quite a distance from anywhere, nothing immediately around hotel but shuttle bus was useful to get to local town/night market (although it was a good 25 minute walk from the drop off point to the night market, I'm not sure why there couldn't be a closer drop off location?). Staff incredibly friendly, polite and helpful. Lots of fun games set up on the beach for kids. Also enjoyed morning yoga and lovely relaxing massage at the spa.
reviews.negatives: Sadly I would not be able to recommend this hotel. The music played at every part of the hotel (restaurants, pool, beach bar and around the grounds) was at a level which was too high to relax. I understand that many guests are happy to listen to music, but to have the same beat thumping away by the pool from 8am-10pm every day was just too much. We spent the whole time trying to find sun loungers as far away from the speakers as possible; not easy as the speakers are located at regular intervals all around the pool and the surrounding area. Such a shame that we couldn't relax and enjoy the sounds of nature for at least part of the day! To ensure the environment appeals to all guests, there should be the option of choosing to sit by the pool bar with the loud music, or finding a quieter area.

reviews.title: Amazing service, great views, rooms!
reviews.text: The hotel is huge with all desired facilities and the staff is amazingly hospitable and friendly. The ocean view rooms offer amazing vista. The breakfast buffet spread was great and caters to all tastes and requests. The grillhouse and beach house are good too. The private beach offers beautiful views and relaxing space though nearby areas could be but more clean. We had a medical emergency while staying and staff were extremely helpful and quick. Will definitely recommend and return.

reviews.title: A beautiful resort to look at with some fantastic attributes needs some refinement to make it great.
reviews.positives: We loved the pool and the beach. The breakfast selection was fantastic. The main bed in our cabanah was very comfortable, the breakfast service at the mad cow was impeccable
reviews.negatives: Well firstly we booked a Cabanah for 2 adults and two children. As well as paying extra for the 4 person occupancy we had to pay more for a sofa bed. I assumed (wrongly) this would be a double bed as my children’s ages are 9 and 11 (which the property knew). It was a single sofa that was already in all the other cabanas so hadn’t been brought in specially. I felt a bit misled that the room was suitable for 4 people even though it was beautiful, on the 3rd day of our stay my son stepped on glass at the pool area. There should never be glass around a pool area. Another guest mentioned it had broken the day before and not been cleaned up properly which was very disappointing. Around the pool there aren’t enough beds. This leads to people putting towels on the beds early in the morning before breakfast. There is now an enforced rule that you can’t leave your towel for more than 30 minutes unattended. I understand this rule however the life guards would move the towels and then when an irate guest came back to find someone else on their bed the life guard who didn’t speak English did not say he had moved it which caused the irate guest to believe the other guest had moved the towel. Not great communication, the service by the pool was so slow and took around 2 hours some days to get a pizza delivered. On our last day we ordered beef tacos. When they arrived they were cold. I didn’t want to create a fuss so said to my husband let’s eat them it’s fine. Well that was a terrible mistake. We both spent the night vomitting,

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives:
The resort is spacious and nicely maintained. It is quiet and pleasant. The beach is very nice and has quiet zones. The rooms are spacious, although quite poorly furnished (no desk, bedside tables or chest of drawers. The bathroom is well-equipped, although the cosmetics are very average. The food is ok, although the staff is not very helpful due to their limited English.

The prices of the hotel and food are very good for a 5* resort, although of course quite high for Vietnam. If you want to relax in a resort, in my opinion this is a good choice in good price.
reviews.negatives:
1. From the outside, the hotel building looks depressing.

2. The hotel management is average, many things are done to make it convenient for the employees and not the guests. An example was the notorious early ending of meals, lying to customers so that they don't do something (we don't have any mangoes anymore - although they were cleared away in the back 1 minute earlier and 15 minutes before the end of breakfast). Another example: if you want to drink coffee by the pool - go to the bar. And if you are in the pool bar, go to another bar, etc.
Other examples of negligence include waking up several times (yes!) at 9am to clean the room, and then not cleaning it until 4pm. So either you adapt to service, or you will have a mess in the room. 

3. At 22 the hotel only operates the bar downstairs. If you want to eat something you can use the room service where there are 6 dishes to choose from. Unfortunately there is no "western" food like hamburger or salad. If you have kids - you have a problem.

reviews.title: Nice hotel and friendly staff
reviews.text:
Nice spacious hotel. Friendly and professional staff. Personally felt it was a bit too big a property, it’s a decent walk from room to pool to beach, could have been closer. The configuration of the pool while looking great, to access the washroom you have to walk a big round if on the other side. Rooms wise, I stayed in king premium in one of the further blocks away from the main hotel building. I think it could do with a refresh, some of the fittings, like hangers, vents, room numbers, you can tell are a little worn. Felt thr water pressure in my room could be stronger too. They do provide yellow beach slippers which are helpful. Also try out the pool by the beach club house, I like it as it’s quiet, the water is cold and refreshing on a hot day, and there’s a DJ there spinning really cool and non mainstream deep house. 

Beach wise, I went in Dec and I found the quality of the sea water to be disappointing. It was murky, you can see your feet, and had these white particles. There’s a breakwater that seemed to be building nearby I don’t know if that had an effect. 

This trip I had stayed further up north at another 5 star resort and I found the sea water there much clearer and pleasant to swim in. 

It’s easy to get cabs from this hotel location and all drivers know it well. To reach the nearest shops it’s a distance, not really walkable so that’s something to keep in mind. But it adds to the exclusivity of the hotel. 

They provide free shuttle to the airport which is great and the welcome drink, hibiscus tea is really nice I had 2! 

If you get Accor explorer+ you can get 15-30% off food n drinks too. I didn’t have it but that was something I learnt while there. 

The gym is ok, not super but doable and in the main building. So if u value Connvenience, then staying in the main building may be helpful though I’m not sure what room types are there in the main building.

reviews.text:
From the moment we arrived, the service was nothing short of exceptional. We were warmly welcomed and escorted to the guest lounge, where the team took care of everything seamlessly. Throughout our stay, every staff member was incredibly attentive, always ready to assist with any request or enquiry — it truly made us feel valued and cared for.

Our room was spotless and beautifully maintained, with thoughtful turn-down service every evening. Everything was exactly as we hoped for — no disappointment at all.

Dining at the Beach House was another highlight — the food was simply amazing, beautifully presented, and full of flavour. Although the beach itself may not be the most spectacular, the warmth and professionalism of the staff more than made up for it, turning our stay into something truly memorable.

The best part of our experience was spending time in the Connectivity Lounge and enjoying breakfast at MadCow — both were absolutely beautiful, offering great ambience and delicious selections. To top it all off, the hotel surprised us with a sweet gesture for our anniversary celebration, which made our stay even more special.

We can’t thank the team enough for such an unforgettable experience. Highly recommended for anyone seeking exceptional service and genuine hospitality.
reviews.response:

Thank you very much for sharing your thoughtful review. We’re truly delighted to hear that your stay with us was memorable from the very first moment and felt well cared by our attentive team throughout your visit. We’re glad you enjoyed your spotless room, thoughtful turn-down service, and the delightful dining experiences at Beach House, Connectivity Lounge, and Mad Cow. It was an honour to be part of your anniversary celebration, and we’re also very happy that the warmth and professionalism of our staff made the difference. We can't wait to welcome back for another unforgettable stay at Pullman Phu Quoc Beach Resort.

Warm regards,
Kim Nguyen

reviews.title: Pullman is love
reviews.text:
We had a wonderful 4-day stay at Pullman Phu Quoc Resort. Since our honeymoon, we have often stayed at Pullman whenever we traveled to Vietnam and Thailand. After having children and traveling with them, our lifestyle has changed a little. We began to notice the huge amount of waste humans produce, and started to worry more about the future of the Earth where our children will live.

“Little act, big difference.” Pullman seems to truly embrace this motto by reducing plastic use, encouraging towel reuse, and taking many steps to protect the environment. We deeply appreciate this value.

In terms of location, the resort is about a 5-minute drive to the Sonasea area, so walking is not very convenient. However, we used the VinBus or the hotel’s 5 PM shuttle service to get to downtown or Sonasea for dining and massages.

Breakfast was amazing, especially since there were many Korean guests and the menu included kimchi, kimchi stew, japchae, and more. It perfectly matched our taste. Honestly, breakfast is one of the most important factors for me when choosing a hotel, and here it was absolutely satisfying—from desserts to pho. At the coffee bar, they even served Bloody Mary cocktails for alcohol lovers, which I highly recommend trying.

Our children love tropical fruits, so we checked the VinBus timetable and visited Duong Bao Market near the Sunset Resort, where we bought fresh mangoes for only 30,000 VND per kilogram. They were so delicious and affordable.
reviews.response:
Dear Jonghee,

Thank you very much for sharing such a heartfelt review of your recent stay with us. It is truly wonderful to hear that Pullman has been a part of your journeys from your honeymoon to now traveling with your children. Your kind words mean a lot to us.

We are especially grateful for your recognition of our sustainability efforts. At Pullman Phu Quoc, we believe that even small actions can create a meaningful impact, and knowing that our initiatives resonate with you and your family is deeply rewarding.

It is also a pleasure to learn that our breakfast selection, with its mix of local and international flavors, matched your taste and added to the enjoyment of your stay. We will certainly share your kind compliments with our culinary team.

Thank you again for your continued trust in Pullman. We look forward to welcoming you and your family back for many more memorable stays.

Warm regards,
Duong Nguyen
Guest Experience Manager
